phase_gate_notes: Do not rename existing route names.
Required safe branch is active and local protected base branch is `master` in this repository.
Phase 2 began from live implementation commit `39d37c34d04842d7bc75a93b085b5f83c68c835a` after reconciling stale Phase 1 handoff metadata against git history.
Phase 2 delivered a guardian-only read portal with dashboard, linked student views, invoice detail, and payment history using the Phase 1 guardian, invoice, payment, and receipt tables.
Legacy management route names were preserved while `portal.home` and `management.surface` middleware now redirect or block guardian-only and donor-only users away from legacy management screens.
Legacy transaction controllers, report controllers, shared management navigation, and historical migrations were left untouched during Phase 2.
The broader suite still reproduces only the 14 documented auth/profile baseline failures.
A fresh thread is required before starting `PHASE_3_DONOR_PORTAL`.
